steps.title: Site Survey & Soil Test

seasonal_maintenance.headline: Year-Round Curb Appeal for {{state}} Properties
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Aerate and overseed near {{parks}} before the first frost. This ensures a thick, green spring lawn.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Adjust mower heights to 3-4 inches near {{neighborhood}} to shade the roots from intense {{state}} afternoon sun.

comparison_guide.title: Natural Sod vs. Seed & Straw in {{city}}

comparison.details: Seed is cheaper but takes 6-12 months to mature in {{city}}. Sod provides an instant erosion-resistant barrier for {{neighborhood}} slopes.
